ingredients_text: Cottage Pie Filling (52%) [No Added Hormone Australian Beef Mince (34.5%), Vegetables (31.5%) (Carrot, Celery, Onion, Peas), Water, Tomato Paste, Corn Starch, Canola Oil, Beef Flavoured Seasoning (contains Flavourings, Natural Colour (150a, Turmeric)), Salt, Herbs (Basil, Marjoram, Rosemary, Thyme), Sugar, Garlic. Worcestershire Sauce Powder (contains Natural Colour (150a))]. Mashed Potato (43%) [Potato (85%), Cream (Milk), Butter (Milk) (5%), Water, Corn Starch, Salt, White Pepper], Cheese Topping (5%) [Cheddar Cheese (Milk) (60%), Mozzarella Cheese (Milk) (40%)].
